title: Circuit Siege Readability Prototype Board
notes: Circuit Siege modular debug demo v0.4.
Readability pass: source-to-terminal routes are less tangled.
Routes still use non-linear mapping and mirrored layout.
Routes use 3 repairs each: hole, refactor, hole.
Repair slots are placed away from high-overlap areas where possible.
Route hover is debug-only and should be disabled for competitive play.
